tasks.subject: Task 1: _normalize_ref pure function + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `_normalize_ref(s: str) -> str` to `src/kinoforge/core/lora.py`. Pure function, no pydantic wiring yet.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/lora.py`
- Create: `tests/core/test_lora_url_normalize.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:** canonical passthrough; civitai URL normalizes; civitai URL without modelVersionId raises ValueError with NO URL text in message (privacy); civarchive parallels civitai; HF blob main no warning; HF blob non-main warns + drops branch; HF bare-repo + unknown host pass through; case-insensitive host+scheme.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lora_url_normalize.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/lora.py", "tests/core/test_lora_url_normalize.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lora_url_normalize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_normalize_ref handles canonical passthrough", "civitai URL with modelVersionId normalizes", "civitai URL without modelVersionId raises ValueError with no URL text", "civarchive URL parallels civitai", "HF blob main branch no warning", "HF blob non-main branch warns once and drops branch", "HF bare-repo passes through unchanged", "unknown host passes through", "case-insensitive host + scheme"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire _normalize_ref into LoraEntry.ref validator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `@field_validator("ref", mode="before")` on `LoraEntry`. Single chokepoint for cfg.loras, vault.loras, grid lora_swap.stack[].ref, CLI heredoc.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/lora.py`
- Modify: `tests/core/test_lora_entry.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:** `LoraEntry(ref=URL)` returns canonical for civitai/civarchive/hf; URL-without-version raises `pydantic.ValidationError` with NO URL text leaking; canonical short form passes through; privacy AST scans still pass; full lora-test regression sweep clean.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lora_entry.py tests/core/test_lora_url_normalize.py tests/core/test_lora_resolve.py tests/core/test_lora_resolver_p3.py tests/test_lora_error_redaction.py tests/test_lora_schema_parity.py tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/lora.py", "tests/core/test_lora_entry.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_lora_entry.py tests/core/test_lora_url_normalize.py tests/core/test_lora_resolve.py tests/core/test_lora_resolver_p3.py tests/test_lora_error_redaction.py tests/test_lora_schema_parity.py tests/test_no_unredacted_writes.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["LoraEntry normalizes civitai URL", "LoraEntry normalizes civarchive URL", "LoraEntry normalizes HF blob URL", "LoraEntry rejects civitai URL without modelVersionId with no URL leak in ValidationError", "canonical short form passes through unchanged", "privacy AST scans still pass", "lora resolver regression sweep clean"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add civarchive to CLI heredoc _KNOWN_SCHEMES
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `--loras` heredoc accepts `civarchive:` canonical refs AND URL forms (without this change `unknown scheme: civarchive` fires at the heredoc layer before LoraEntry runs).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/loras_arg.py` (extend `_KNOWN_SCHEMES`; update `missing-scheme` suggestion)
- Modify: `tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:** civarchive canonical line parsed; civitai/civarchive/hf URL lines flow through to LoraEntry validator and emerge canonical; version-missing URL raises `LorasParseError` with privacy-respecting rendered report (no URL text); `civarchive` in `_KNOWN_SCHEMES`; missing-scheme suggestion lists civarchive.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/loras_arg.py", "tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_loras_arg.py tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["civarchive in _KNOWN_SCHEMES", "heredoc accepts civarchive canonical ref", "heredoc accepts civitai URL and normalizes", "heredoc accepts civarchive URL and normalizes", "heredoc accepts hf blob URL and normalizes", "version-missing URL raises LorasParseError with privacy-respecting rendered report", "missing-scheme error suggestion lists civarchive"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: CLI --loras help text + docs/warm-reuse.md operator note
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface URL acceptance in CLI `--help` and the warm-reuse operator doc.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py` (`--loras` help string)
- Modify: `docs/warm-reuse.md` (`--loras` section)
- Modify: `tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:** `kinoforge generate --help` contains "URLs from civitai.com, civarchive.com, huggingface.co"; help mentions `?modelVersionId=` requirement + civarchive resolver pending; `docs/warm-reuse.md` gains URL-acceptance paragraph + URL→canonical-ref table; lora-test regression sweep clean.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py::test_loras_help_includes_loras_arg -v && pixi run kinoforge generate --help | grep -F 'URLs from civitai.com'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "docs/warm-reuse.md", "tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_cmd_generate_loras.py::test_loras_help_includes_loras_arg -v && pixi run kinoforge generate --help | grep -F 'URLs from civitai.com'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLI --help includes URLs sentence", "help mentions modelVersionId requirement", "help mentions civarchive resolver pending", "docs/warm-reuse.md gains URL-acceptance paragraph + table", "lora-test regression sweep clean"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: PROGRESS.md close-out + workstream-CLOSED entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mark sub-project A SHIPPED in `PROGRESS.md` so next session picks up sub-project B (civarchive source module) per the pinned TOP PRIORITY note.

**Files:**
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:** Active workstream block replaced with SHIPPED summary citing Tasks 1–4 commits + spec/plan pointers; TOP PRIORITY block (sub-project B) preserved verbatim; new SHIPPED block sits above the 2026-06-28 sweeper-ephemeral-reap block.

**Verify:** `head -80 PROGRESS.md | grep -c 'TOP PRIORITY'` is 1; `git log --oneline -1` shows the close-out commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "head -80 PROGRESS.md | grep -c 'TOP PRIORITY' && git log --oneline -1 | grep -F 'SHIPPED'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Active workstream replaced with SHIPPED block", "TOP PRIORITY block (sub-project B) preserved verbatim", "SHIPPED block lists 4 commits with correct hashes", "close-out commit lands"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
